titleText: JTF News: Deutsche Welle, PBS NewsHour
mainText: President Trump meets with Friedrich Merz, Chancellor of Germany.
The State Department urged U.S. citizens to leave more than a dozen Middle Eastern countries.
U.S. embassy in Saudi Arabia was hit by Iranian drones.

titleText: JTF News: BBC News, Deutsche Welle
mainText: The United States imposed sanctions on the Rwandan military over fighting in eastern Congo.
Israel conducted strikes on Beirut and Tehran.
